sharedMemory.review.synthesis: 5 specialist reviewers completed multi-angle review of test-suite plan. Top blockers: (1) migrate:fresh produces wrong schema vs prod — Xero tables missing, UUID-function privilege issue, weighingheaders.id type mismatch (string vs int); (2) Azure Pipelines task uses GitHub Actions syntax, won't validate; (3) WeighingHeaderFactory missing workstation_id NOT NULL FK + doesn't handle string PK; (4) R.13 last_report_on bug already addressed via Kernel.php after() hook — proposed R.13 will double-advance, real bug is that after() fires regardless of failure; (5) R.6 inject-ReportingController will silently NPE in cron via JwtAuth constructor. Timeline 7.5wk is optimistic by 40-60% — realistic 12-16wk single eng. MVP path recommended: Phase 0 + R + 2 + 11.1 in ~4-5 weeks. Phase 10 CRUD template low value. Many SQL substring tests should assert result sets. Xero mocks should be cassettes. Red tests need @group exclusion or CI breaks. Per-controller cross-company isolation, database_scripts/*.sql smoke test, non-CRUD routes (deleteWithReason, file uploads, esp32 proxy), XeroCallbackController, cam_pic.php/npr.php all uncovered.
sharedMemory.phase-0.factories.concerns: Factory batch (Tasks 0.5-0.14) committed with 3 concerns to verify in dev container: (1) users.role_id uses Laravel constrained() which looks for `roles` table but UserType lives in `usertypes`; UserFactory may FK-fail at insert. (2) Grade model has no create_grades_table migration in repo; Phase 0.3 schema bootstrap may not produce a grades table. (3) Plan referenced columns that don't exist in current migrations: contract_enabled on sites, total_tonnes/remaining_tonnes/packaging_price_per_ton/shipping_price_per_ton on contracts, time_frame on reporting. Schema audit (0.12c) skipped due to local Docker WSL2 OOM constraint.
sharedMemory.phase-0.complete: Phase 0 (Infrastructure) complete. 25 commits on origin/test/phase-0-infra. All factories use real model fields verified against migrations. Concerns to address in dev container or Phase R: (1) users.role_id FK uses constrained() pointing at non-existent `roles` table — TestDomainSeeder defensively sets role_id to UserType id; needs proper fix. (2) Grade has no migration — bootstrap may not produce grades table. (3) Azure Pipelines untested — first CI run will reveal fixable issues. (4) Several plan-referenced columns absent from migrations (contract_enabled on sites, total_tonnes/remaining_tonnes/packaging_price_per_ton/shipping_price_per_ton on contracts, time_frame on reporting). (5) CLAUDE.md was created in the worktree from scratch — main checkout has its own untracked version that will conflict on merge.
sharedMemory.phase-r.complete: Phase R (Refactor) complete. 9 commits + 3 no-ops. ReportingSqlBuilderTest interface preserved (controller methods are thin delegators). Coordinated commit 37af623 ships R.10+R.13+Kernel cleanup together. R.14 makes scheduled emails respect saved Site/Weighbridge/Product filters. R.6 extracted App\Services\ReportDataBuilder removing JwtAuth dependency from cron path. R.4 added CameraImageFetcher interface seat for Phase 7 tests. Pre-existing spaghetti dangling-else in show_deleted block preserved verbatim — do not fix without test. Phase 1 Task 1.13 and 1.14 red tests should be flipped to green now.
sharedMemory.programme.complete: Full test-suite programme complete. 134 commits on origin/test/phase-0-infra (off Dev). All 13 phases delivered: Phase 0 infrastructure (schema bootstrap + 14 factories + FeatureTestCase helper), Phase R 9 refactor commits (ReportDataBuilder extraction, $_GET->Request, error_reporting removal, R.10+R.13+Kernel coordinated commit, R.11 CSV uniqueness, R.12 accumulate fopen failures, R.14 saved filters, R.4 camera HTTP abstraction), Phases 1-9 feature+unit tests by subsystem, Phase 10 CRUD + non-CRUD + legacy PHP, Phase 11 regression index + security (auth sweep/exception leak/queue drain/ErrorLog/migration round-trip), Phase 12 CI (Cobertura coverage + 20% gate + Infection scaffolding). 9 prior bugfix commits regression-pinned. 3 known-bug RED tests flipped GREEN verifying R.10/R.11/R.12 fixes. All tests written but NOT run (Docker WSL2 OOM) — first CI run is the first real parse. Outstanding: PO sign-off on 2.4/2.5, logout route (6.8), SendDailyEmail dead code (9.4), cross-tenant leaks in many controllers pinned via @group cross-tenant, Azure Pipelines first-run validation, coverage gate ratchet.
sharedMemory.review.round2.synthesis: 9-reviewer audit of test/phase-0-infra. CRITICAL: schema bootstrap broken (DELIMITER splitter, UUID CALL missing, FK tolerance gap, D-SwitchToInnoDB hardcoded DB, $bootstrapped per-class). HIGH: R.4 cosmetic injection, R.7 isset→filled drift 4 controllers, R.6 delegator contract, R.13 latent queued-mail data loss, R.14 silent customer-visible behavior change, R.11 disk-fill risk, 6 theater tests, per-class bootstrap performance (-6 to -10 min/CI). MED: task 1.8/2.14/9.6/GradeController coverage drift, maintainability (no tests/README, duplicated AS400 tests, undated skips). Security findings (SQLi/shell-inj/mass-assign/CSV-inj/SSRF in cam_pic) scoped out by user as internal-app but documented. Fix plan: Group 1 bootstrap, Group 2 Phase R drift, Group 3 theater+coverage, Group 4 perf, Group 5 maintainability.
sharedMemory.review.fixes.complete: Review fix-plan complete. 25 fix commits across 5 groups, 159 total commits on origin/test/phase-0-infra. Group 1 schema bootstrap (1 commit: DELIMITER splitter, UUID BINARY(16) conversion, FK tolerance, skip list expansion, SchemaBootstrapper singleton). Group 2 Phase R drift (5 commits: R.4 reverted, R.7 filled→has, R.6 forward Reporting state, R.13 non-queued pin test, R.14 release notes). Group 3 theater tests (10 commits: ErrorLog strict, RegressionIndex class_exists pins, AS400 Option B direct predicate, AS400 null file-absent, LargePayload /api/updateImage, WeighingCameraService test deleted, ordered() toggle assertion, SecondWeight strict 2xx+CLOSED, Mailable behavioral bug-20 pin, Grade cross-tenant). Group 4 performance (3 commits: RollsBackDatabase trait -3.5 to -6 min/CI, processUncoveredFiles=false -2 to -3 min, infection opt-in). Group 5 maintainability (6 commits: tests/README.md, FeatureTestCase helpers, AS400 consolidation + WeighingScenario trait, ExampleTest removal, @group doc, CRUD docblock backfill). Outstanding NEEDS_CONTEXT: composer.lock stale warning, Mailable attachment internals assumption (Fix 9 Group 3), LargePayload second test /api/weighing/save route, ErrorLog handler rewire decision (PO), AS400 gate mirror expression lockstep, second-payload test route target.
sharedMemory.enterprise.fix.shipped: Enterprise report MySQL 1054 fix shipped to BOTH Dev (hotfix b776d11 on ReportingController.php) AND test/phase-0-infra (8c522cd on ReportDataBuilder.php). Option C: only literal "exception" ReportType queries exceptions table; transaction/enterprise/any-custom-label queries weighingheaders. 6 guards flipped from == "transaction" to !== "exception"; FROM-picker wrapped in explicit braces. Red tests added: test_enterprise_report_type_uses_weighingheaders_from_clause, test_exception_report_type_still_uses_exceptions_from_clause. Existing Phase 1 tests unchanged — they used ReportType=transaction which still takes the weighingheaders branch.
sharedMemory.review.round3.dispatched: Third review round dispatched after 25 fix commits + Enterprise hotfix landed. Angles: fix verification per commit, integration consistency, CI first-run predictions, Enterprise fix parity (Dev hotfix vs worktree), test quality post-rewrite, residual debt audit.
sharedMemory.group6.complete: Group 6 shipped. 3 commits: ff206a2 delete LargePayloadGuardTest; 29336b4 CI PHPIZE_DEPS + coverage gate to 10%; 782f5fd delete SendDailyEmail dead code. Fix D no-op — round-3 reviewer was wrong about $rawAttachments visibility; both $attachments and $rawAttachments are public on Laravel 8 Mailable (vendor lines 115, 122). Existing ReportMailableTest works fine. Remaining deferred: cam_pic/npr SSRF (needs refactor into Laravel controller), logout route (product decision), AS400 mirror discipline (commented), composer.lock cosmetic. Branch test/phase-0-infra now at commit 782f5fd, total 162 commits.
sharedMemory.pricing.oncause.fix.shipped: Second production bug fixed (42S22 on JOIN ON clause under GROUP BY). The Enterprise fix (b776d11 Dev / 8c522cd worktree) correctly routed Enterprise to FROM weighingheaders but exposed a latent bug in ReportPricingSqlHelper::unitPriceScalarSubquery — LEFT JOIN contract_transactions ctr ON ctr.weighing_header_id = weighingheaders.id trips MariaDB's rejection of outer refs in correlated subquery JOIN ON under GROUP BY. The comment above the function already documented this quirk (half-fixed for products, missed for contract_transactions). Fix shipped: Dev 2f42150 (hotfix), worktree 3ad82cb (with regression test test_pricing_sql_does_not_reference_weighingheaders_in_any_on_clause). Behavior preserved — nested scalar subquery returns NULL if no matching ctr, LEFT JOIN to contracts yields NULL ct.price, CASE falls through to goods_type as before.
